prompt_text:
You are an accessibility auditor evaluating inline SVG elements for WCAG
criterion 1.1.1 (Non-text Content, Level A).

Only non-decorative SVGs (those without aria-hidden="true") are included.
For informative SVGs, the WCAG-compliant pattern is:

  svg role="img" aria-labelledby="svg-title-id"
    title id="svg-title-id" Descriptive title /title
    desc Optional longer description /desc

For each SVG, evaluate:
- Is role="img" set?
- Is a title element present?
- Is aria-labelledby linking to the title?
- If a title exists, is the title text meaningful and descriptive?
- Is an aria-label used as an alternative — is it sufficient?

Return a JSON array:
[
  {
    "role": "string or null",
    "aria_label": "string or null",
    "aria_labelledby": "string or null",
    "title": "string or null",
    "desc": "string or null",
    "has_accessible_name": true/false,
    "title_is_meaningful": true/false/null,
    "issues": [],
    "recommendation": "string or null"
  }
]

Data: [
  {
    "role": null,
    "aria_label": null,
    "aria_labelledby": null,
    "title": null,
    "desc": null
  }
]

api_result.response:
```json
[
  {
    "role": null,
    "aria_label": null,
    "aria_labelledby": null,
    "title": null,
    "desc": null,
    "has_accessible_name": false,
    "title_is_meaningful": null,
    "issues": [
      "Missing role=\"img\" — screen readers will not announce this SVG as an image",
      "Missing <title> element — no programmatic label is available for assistive technologies",
      "Missing aria-labelledby — no association between the SVG and a descriptive label",
      "Missing aria-label — no fallback accessible name is provided",
      "SVG has no accessible name by any supported method (title, aria-label, aria-labelledby)"
    ],
    "recommendation": "If this SVG is informative, apply the full WCAG-compliant pattern: add role=\"img\" to the <svg> element, insert a <title id=\"svg-title-[unique-id]\"> with a concise, meaningful description of the image's purpose, and link it via aria-labelledby=\"svg-title-[unique-id]\". Optionally add a <desc> element for a longer description. Example: <svg role=\"img\" aria-labelledby=\"svg-title-1\"><title id=\"svg-title-1\">A bar chart showing monthly sales growth from January to June 2024</title></svg>. If the SVG is purely decorative, add aria-hidden=\"true\" to remove it from the accessibility tree entirely."
  }
]
```
